summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 14 forum enhancement features. Backend: 33/33 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly after fixing Dashboard.jsx syntax error.

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing curly braces around posts.map() JSX expression on line 224
fixed_bugs.fix: Added { } around posts.map() to properly render the posts list

passed_tests: Backend - Get Categories with enhanced data (active_users, last_activity)
Backend - Sorting: newest, oldest, popular, most_replies
Backend - Get Post with user status (liked, bookmarked, is_own_post)
Backend - Get Bookmarks with category info
Backend - Get Replies with user status
Frontend - Forums page loads with trending sidebar
Frontend - Guidelines button opens community guidelines modal
Frontend - Category cards show post count and active users
Frontend - Forum category page has sorting dropdown
Frontend - Forum category page has filter dropdown
Frontend - Create post with character count visible
Frontend - View post shows like, bookmark buttons
Frontend - Bookmarks page shows saved posts
Frontend - Post menu shows Edit/Delete/Report options
Frontend - Edit mode with character count
Frontend - Report modal with reason selection
Frontend - Reply form with character count
Frontend - Notifications bell icon in navigation
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed creates forum categories and chat rooms
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 forum enhancement features have been implemented and tested: 1) Sorting & Filtering 2) Edit/Delete posts 3) Bookmarks 4) Nested replies 5) Trending posts 6) Unanswered filter 7) Like replies 8) Notifications 9) Enhanced category cards 10) Character count 11) Pagination 12) Report posts/replies 13) Community guidelines modal 14) Bookmarks page. Test user forumtester@test.com is available for testing.

features_verified.sorting_filtering: Sorting by newest, oldest, popular, most_replies. Filtering by all, unanswered, trending
features_verified.edit_delete_posts: Authors can edit/delete their own posts with confirmation modal
features_verified.bookmarks: Toggle bookmark, view bookmarks page with category info
features_verified.nested_replies: Replies can have parent_reply_id for threading
features_verified.trending_posts: Sidebar shows top 5 trending posts based on engagement score
features_verified.unanswered_filter: Shows posts with reply_count=0, displays 'Needs Reply' badge
features_verified.like_replies: Toggle like on replies with count
features_verified.notifications: Bell icon with unread count, dropdown shows notifications
features_verified.report_system: Report modal with reason dropdown and details field
features_verified.bookmarks_page: /bookmarks shows saved posts with remove option
